channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit Begins in Beijing with Trade and Iran War on Agenda
item.description: President Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping opened high-stakes talks in Beijing, with Xi saying the two nations should be "partners not rivals." Trump brought CEOs including Nvidia's Jensen Huang and Elon Musk, seeking China's help on the Iran war and trade cooperation.

item.title: 🇮🇳⚔️ Iran War Casts Shadow Over BRICS Foreign Ministers Meeting in Delhi
item.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is testing BRICS unity as foreign ministers gather in New Delhi, with the bloc struggling to reach a unified position on the conflict that has disrupted global oil markets.

item.title: 🛢️🇷🇺 Russia Oil Output Drops 460,000 Barrels Per Day Amid Ukraine Drone Attacks
item.description: Russian crude production fell to 8.8 million barrels per day in April, down 460,000 bpd year-on-year, as Ukraine intensified drone strikes on energy infrastructure, according to the IEA.

item.title: 🏛️💰 Warsh Confirmed as Fed Chair Amid Rising Inflation Pressures
item.description: The US Senate confirmed Warsh as Federal Reserve Chair by a 54-45 vote, the most partisan confirmation ever for a Fed chair, as inflation concerns mount from oil price shocks linked to the Iran war.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanon-Israel Ceasefire Talks Resume in Washington
item.description: Lebanon and Israel are holding new peace talks in Washington as their latest ceasefire nears expiration, amid continued Hezbollah attacks on Israeli forces in southern Lebanon.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China stages naval drills near Philippines as US launches Balikatan 2026
item.description: China's PLA Southern Theatre Command conducted naval exercises east of Luzon, coinciding with the launch of US-Philippines Balikatan 2026 drills featuring unprecedented Japanese participation.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany opens trial of "Ulm 5" activists over Elbit arms firm attack
item.description: Five activists face trial in Stuttgart for a September 2025 attack on an Israeli arms manufacturer's German subsidiary, charged under controversial criminal organization statutes.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese AI satire of US-Iran war goes viral on state media
item.description: A wuxia-style animated allegory by CCTV depicting the "White Eagle" vs "Persian Cat" conflict has triggered user-made spin-offs, reflecting Chinese public engagement with the Iran war narrative.

item.title: 🛢️ Iran explores yuan-for-Hormuz oil trade plan, Chinese analysts urge caution
item.description: Reports suggest Iran may allow oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz if trade is conducted in Chinese yuan, but analysts warn of implementation challenges and risks to China-US relations.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as new Fed Chair
item.description: The US Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve Chair in a 54-45 vote, the most partisan confirmation ever for a Fed chair. Warsh replaces Jerome Powell as inflation concerns mount amid the Iran war oil shock.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine strikes Russian oil terminal, refinery and gas plant
item.description: Ukraine resumed attacks on Russian energy infrastructure after a short-lived ceasefire, hitting an oil terminal, refinery and gas processing plant in response to Russia's massive drone assault that killed six civilians in western Ukraine.

item.title: 🇨🇭 Switzerland eyes rival air defenses after US delays Patriot delivery
item.description: Switzerland said it will explore air-defense systems from other suppliers after the US informed it that Patriot missile deliveries will be further delayed due to the Iran war, highlighting how the conflict is straining global weapons supplies.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Indian rupee hits all-time low as Iran war shadows Trump China trip
item.description: The Indian rupee is expected to remain under pressure, holding near its record low, as persistent oil-linked headwinds from the Iran war continue to weigh on the currency during Trump's high-stakes summit with Xi.

item.title: 🇿🇲 Zambia cuts rates despite Iran war inflation risks
item.description: Zambia's central bank lowered its main interest rate, saying it sees inflation staying within target range despite risks from the Iran war, becoming one of the few central banks to ease amid global inflationary pressures.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Explosions rock Kyiv as daytime drone strike escalates to missile attack
item.description: Russian forces launched a mass daytime drone attack on Kyiv that escalated into a large-scale missile strike, marking an escalation in tactics against the Ukrainian capital.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House unanimously passes resolution urging Trump to press Xi on China detainees
item.description: The House voted unanimously to urge President Trump to raise the issue of American detainees in China during his meeting with President Xi.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing: Iran War and Trade Top Agenda
item.description: President Trump meets Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing for high-stakes talks on the Iran conflict and trade relations. Trump says he does not need China's help on Iran, but analysts say Beijing's cooperation is critical for any diplomatic resolution.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇸 Kremlin Says Russia Ready for US Business Ties If Ukraine Link Dropped
item.description: Russia expressed interest in joint economic projects with the United States if Washington stops linking trade relations to a Ukraine peace deal, signaling potential flexibility in US-Russia relations.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇧🇷 Iran War Shadow Over BRICS Foreign Ministers Meeting in Delhi
item.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is set to dominate the BRICS foreign ministers meeting in New Delhi, testing the bloc's ability to reach a unified position as members balance relations with Tehran and Washington.

item.title: 🇪🇺💰 ECB Warns Iran Oil Shock May Force Interest Rate Hikes
item.description: European Central Bank chief economist Philip Lane warned that a sustained oil shock from the Iran war may require interest rate increases to prevent higher fuel costs from spreading to wages and broader prices.

item.title: ⚖️ Iran releases prominent human rights lawyer Nasrin Sotoudeh on bail
item.description: Iran freed prominent human rights lawyer Nasrin Sotoudeh, who was arrested in April during a crackdown amid the conflict with the US and Israel. Her release on bail marks a rare concession during wartime.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia places former UK Defence Minister Ben Wallace on wanted list
item.description: Russia has placed former British defence minister Ben Wallace on its wanted list in connection with an unspecified criminal investigation, escalating tensions with the UK.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇦🇲 Turkey and Armenia move closer to direct trade links
item.description: Turkey lifted some customs restrictions on Armenia, paving the way for direct trade between the two countries in a further sign of normalizing ties after more than 30 years of strained relations.

item.title: 📈 US producer prices surge most in four years as Iran war drives inflation
item.description: US producer prices posted their biggest increase in four years in April, boosted by soaring costs for goods and services, the latest sign of accelerating inflation amid the war with Iran.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary summons Russian ambassador over drone strikes on western Ukraine
item.description: Hungary summoned Russia's ambassador after unprecedented drone attacks hit western Ukraine near its border. The strikes came hours after PM Orban criticized EU support for Ukraine.
